author: BiCuriousGeorge#8804
install_msg: Soundboard cog installed! The bot will auto-join your voice channel and play sounds from the web soundboard via Lavalink. Make sure the Audio cog is loaded and local sources are enabled in your Lavalink application.yml.
name: Soundboard
short: Web-controlled soundboard for Discord voice via Lavalink
description: Runs an HTTP API server that receives play/stop commands from a web-based soundboard. Auto-joins the bot owner's voice channel and plays local audio files through Lavalink. Requires the Audio cog to be loaded and local: true in Lavalink's application.yml.
